title: Route Calls to an Agent
lede: Decide what happens when someone dials your number. Routing is set per number — assign an inbound AI agent to answer incoming calls, and an outbound agent for calls you place from that number.

steps.title: Open the phone number
steps.content:
1. Go to Call Center → Phone numbers.
  2. Click the number you want to configure to open its details panel. The Inbound Agent column shows what a number currently routes to (it reads None until you assign one).

images.alt: Phone numbers list with inbound agent column
images.caption: The Inbound Agent column shows which agent answers each number.

images.alt: Phone numbers list with inbound agent column
images.caption: The Inbound Agent column shows which agent answers each number.

steps.title: Assign the inbound agent
steps.content:
1. In the number's details, find Inbound Agent (the AI agent that answers incoming calls).
  2. Pick an agent from the dropdown. Only agents you've already created appear here.
  3. Save. From now on, calls to this number are answered by that agent.

To set an Outbound Agent — used when the number places calls (for example dialer campaigns) — pick one from the outbound dropdown in the same panel.

steps.title: Optional: forwarding and fallbacks
steps.content:
In the same details panel you can add fallback behavior:

  • Forward to an agent or number when a call comes in.
  • Send busy or no-answer calls to a chosen agent.
  • Auto-dial missed calls back with an agent.

Leave these off if you just want the inbound agent to answer every call.

steps.title: Assign several numbers at once
steps.content:
1. On the Phone numbers list, tick the checkboxes for multiple numbers.
  2. Use the bulk action to set the same inbound or outbound agent across all selected numbers.
  3. Clear an assignment the same way by choosing None.

steps.title: Test and confirm
steps.content:
1. Call the number from your phone — your assigned agent should pick up.
  2. Check Call Center → Call Logs to confirm the call was recorded and handled by the right agent.

images.alt: Call logs confirming a routed call
images.caption: Call Logs confirm which agent handled each call.

images.alt: Call logs confirming a routed call
images.caption: Call Logs confirm which agent handled each call.

metaTitle: Route Calls to an Agent - Inbound Call Routing | iMash Docs
metaDescription: Assign an inbound AI agent to a phone number so it answers calls, set an outbound agent, add forwarding fallbacks, and bulk-assign numbers.
